operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Hamas Delays Disarmament Response; Ceasefire Holds as IDF Targeted Strikes Continue
heroSubtitle: Hamas signals intent to seek amendments to Board of Peace 8-month disarmament plan, citing Iran war; UNDP cargo suspended; 700+ Palestinians killed since October ceasefire; 391 UNRWA staff killed — highest in UN history
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,267+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / UN OCHA, Mar 27 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803. UNDP shipments suspended Mar 25, 2026 after contraband discovery.
